name: eqemu-oracle
description: Deterministic EQEmu scripting, schema, and documentation context for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Deterministic EQEmu context for scripting, schema, and docs
interface.longDescription: Bring deterministic EQEmu context into Codex through local staged snapshots, extension overlays, and a built-in MCP server for Perl and Lua quest API lookup, MySQL schema lookup, and official documentation lookup.
defaultPrompt: Use EQEmu Oracle to explain this Perl or Lua quest API call
Use EQEmu Oracle to find the schema and relationships for this EQEmu table
Use EQEmu Oracle to locate the official EQEmu documentation page for this topic
